class.name: PhysicsShapeIntersectionResult2D
class.brief_description: Stores the results of a shape intersection query.
class.description: This class contains the intersection information produced by [method PhysicsDirectSpaceState2D.intersect_shape]. It can store multiple collisions, up to a user-defined maximum.

method.name: get_collider
method.description: Returns the collider object at the given result index.

method.name: get_collider_id
method.description: Returns the unique ID of the collider at the given result index.

method.name: get_collider_rid
method.description: Returns the [RID] of the collider at the given result index.

method.name: get_collider_shape
method.description: Returns the shape index of the collider at the given result index.

method.name: get_collision_count
method.description: Returns the number of shapes that intersect the queried shape.

method.name: get_max_collisions
method.description: Returns the maximum number of collisions this result object can store.

method.name: set_max_collisions
method.description: Resizes the internal buffer to store up to [code]max_collisions[/code] results. Existing data is discarded.
